entities.worker: a construction worker in a hard hat

scenes.title: The Construction Site
scenes.background_prompt: An urban construction site with a concrete foundation, steel beams rising, scaffolding, a crane in the background, and a chain-link fence. Midday. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: An urban construction site at midday. A construction worker in an orange hard hat, a high-visibility vest, and work boots stands on a concrete slab, studying a blueprint rolled out on a makeshift table of stacked cinder blocks. Behind him, a building is half-built: the lower floors have concrete walls and windows installed, while the upper floors are still exposed steel beams and scaffolding covered in blue safety netting. A tall yellow crane looms behind the structure, its arm extended. Piles of lumber, rebar, and bags of cement are stacked near the chain-link fence that surrounds the site. A sign on the fence reads 'Coming Soon: Greenfield Apartments' with an artist's rendering of the finished building — a sharp contrast to the current skeletal state.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place worker on the concrete slab, standing and studying a blueprint on a makeshift table of stacked cinder blocks.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground, a brown dirt path scattered with small grey pebbles runs horizontally across the bottom, bordered by green grass filled with small white, yellow, and purple flowers and green clovers. Behind the path, a grey chain-link fence with vertical metal posts spans the width of the scene. On the far left, a large, rounded green tree with a thick brown trunk stands behind the fence. In the center-left, a worker stands facing right, holding a large white blueprint in both hands. The worker has brown hair and wears a yellow hard hat, an orange safety vest over a blue short-sleeved shirt, brown work pants with a tool belt, and brown boots. To the right of the the worker's feet is a stack of three grey cinder blocks. Behind the worker is a building under construction, featuring a yellow facade with brown window frames and a brown roofline. The building is surrounded by an intricate system of wooden scaffolding. To the left of the building's central yellow section, the scaffolding is mostly empty. The central section has two floors with windows, while the right side of the building shows an exposed wooden frame with beams and joists. Within the construction site, several wooden ladders are leaned against the structure, and bags of cement and wooden planks are scattered on various levels of the scaffolding and the ground. To the right of the building, more wooden scaffolding extends outwards. On the far right, another large, rounded green tree stands behind the fence. Behind the building, a tall yellow and grey construction crane rises into the sky, its horizontal jib extending to the left. In the far background, more green trees, bushes, and the roofs of distant houses are visible under a bright sky filled with large, fluffy, cream-colored and white clouds, indicating a clear, sunny day.

a man wearing an orange safety vest
